candidates.name: genuspipilelifespan610/skills-repository
candidates.description: Manage, import, and distribute Agent skills from multiple sources with security checks and template reuse in a unified desktop app.

candidates.name: Trex740/hatch3r
candidates.description: Install an agentic coding setup that adds multiple AI agents, skills, and rules to enhance automation across GitHub, Azure DevOps, or GitLab repositories.

candidates.name: stefaniuk/awesome-promptfiles
candidates.description: 🤖 A curated, specification-first library of copy-ready prompts, instruction packs, skills, and Copilot agents designed to keep AI helpers aligned with the spec-kit operating model - delivering consistent, deterministic automation across repositories through shared guardrails, governance gates, and repeatable quality checks.

candidates.name: michaelwinczuk/knowledge-graph-reasoning
candidates.description: Agent Skill for Claude: Build, query, validate, and reason over knowledge graphs. Adversarial fact validation, deterministic reasoning, JSON-LD schema.

candidates.name: AjaySreekumar47/scientific-doc-ai-kg
candidates.description: An end-to-end document intelligence pipeline converting scientific PDFs into structured Knowledge Graphs. Features layout-aware parsing (text, tables, figures) via PyMuPDF/OCR, schema-validated JSON, and RDF transformation for GraphDB. Includes SPARQL querying, provenance tracing, and a FastAPI interface. Containerized and CI/CD ready.

candidates.name: Pawpaw-Technology/llm-wiki
candidates.description: LLM Wiki — team knowledge base toolkit. CLI + MCP interface for LLM-maintained markdown wikis.

candidates.name: darthblanc/anansi
candidates.description: A quiz and evaluator agent built on top of Karpathy's LLM wiki pattern. Generates contextual quizzes from your markdown knowledge base and evaluates your answers using Claude AI.

candidates.name: Pratiyush/llm-wiki
candidates.description: LLM-powered knowledge base from your Claude Code, Codex CLI, Copilot, Cursor & Gemini sessions. Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern — implemented and shipped.

recommended_change.summary: Add eval coverage for repository-relative transport_status.web_search.error_log path in degraded web_search runs.
